The Marvels (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $84,500,223Details
International Box Office $121,636,602
Worldwide Box Office $206,136,825
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,046,818
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,543,319
Total $5,590,137
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Carol Danvers, aka Captain Marvel, has reclaimed her identity from the tyrannical Kree and taken revenge on the Supreme Intelligence. However, unintended consequences see her shouldering the burden of a destabilized universe. When her duties send her to an anomalous wormhole linked to a Kree revolutionary, her powers become entangled with two other superheroes to form the Marvels.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,110,859 (54.6% of total gross)
Legs:1.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$270,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,030 opening theaters/4,030 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $92,377,915

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 10th, 2023 (Wide) by Walt Disney
November 10th, 2023 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
November 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: January 16th, 2024 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action/violence and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2802 (cert #54662), 9/27/2023)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Captain Marvel
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): England, Italy, United Kingdom, United States
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Carol Danvers, aka Captain Marvel, has reclaimed her identity from the tyrannical Kree and taken revenge on the Supreme Intelligence. However, unintended consequences see her shouldering the burden of a destabilized universe. When her duties send her to an anomalous wormhole linked to a Kree revolutionary, her powers become entangled with two other superheroes to form the Marvels.
